scope.goal: Restore deterministic test execution and close critical behavior coverage gaps using repository test standards.
constraints: Use GWT and approved mocking/event observation patterns
Required automated tests use Wolverine local/in-memory queues
Real Kafka/RabbitMQ tests are manual opt-in and excluded from the solution
non_goals: Production behavior changes hidden in tests

user_constraints: Verify process-lock hypothesis before killing processes

acceptance: No leaked test processes or locked outputs

steps: Design and implement missing GWT scenarios
Place real broker tests in a manual-only project outside MQArchLab.slnx
Run full suite without leaked processes

results.summary: Added an explicit Orders InMemory composition profile and moved the endpoint test off Kafka. The profile stubs external transports, uses local queues, skips Wolverine PostgreSQL persistence, and disables the source-outbox DB relay. Remaining Inventory/PlaceOrder coverage and full-solution test isolation are pending.
validation_evidence: Post-test inventory found no testhost.exe or vstest.console.exe
